'''Sheevis Tull''' was the father of [[Sheeka Tull]] and a younger [[Sheeka Tull's sister|daughter]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] and his wife died during a range war on [[Atrivis 7]]. Prior to his death, he taught Sheeka to fly.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
